name: Ultimate Game of Thrones RPG
description:
The ultimate Game of Thrones RPG!

Features multiple scripts, a huge lorebook with over 150 entries, and advanced storytelling and prose writing abilities! Roleplay with iconic characters such as Arya Stark, Cersei Lannister, Daenerys Targaryen, Jamie Lannister, Jon Snow, Sansa Stark, and Tyrion Lannister!

How to Use:

  • Unlike other bots, this bot is intended to narrate everything your character does and says. When using this bot, I recommend always putting your inputs in parentheses -- (input text) -- and providing clear, concise instructions on how you would like the bot to respond. For example: "(Continue. Be detailed. Be descriptive in a vivid, evocative way. Jon Snow lifts his sword and thrusts it into the White Walker, which shatters into a million pieces.)"

  • Remember that these types of bots are heavily dependent on the LLM you're using, especially their context size, so your experience may vary depending on what you're using.

  • Remember that scripts currently only trigger based on your input.

Note: It is highly recommended that you use a proxy for the best experience. This bot was tested using Claude, Deepseek, and Gemini.

Changelog:

  • 5/22/2026: Added Alicent Hightower and Rhaenyra Targaryen to the lorebook. These entries are based on my Alicent Hightower and Rhaenyra Targaryen bots, and, therefore, reflect the young versions of each character. Additionally, the entries treat them as characters, not historical figures, so that they can inserted into the roleplay for crossover, "past person is transported to present" type roleplays.

  • 5/17/2026: Added built-in character section entries for Petyr Baelish, Stannis Baratheon, Theon Greyjoy, and Varys. Updated the built-in character section entries for Bran Stark, Brienne of Tarth, Bronn, Catelyn Stark, Davos Seaworth, Eddard Stark, Joffrey Baratheon, Jorah Mormont, Margaery Tyrell, Melisandre, Missandei, Oberyn Martell, Ramsay Bolton, Robb Stark, Samwell Tarly, Sandor Clegane, and Tywin Lannister.

    • Note: All entries in the built-in character section are now written in the present-tense and include personality traits for each character. Most AI models should be able to handle whether a character is alive or dead in the context of the roleplay, regardless of if their entry is written in the present-tense. The personality traits included in each character's entry should not produce a noticeable change in how the bot portrays them. I will be monitoring how these change effects the bot's behavior. Feedback would be greatly appreciated.

  • 5/10/2026: Updated the built-in character section to improve the bot's ability to dynamically insert characters into the roleplay, improve the depth of information, and reduce token count.

  • 5/5/2026: Woah, 1 million messages!
